---
name: Spec amendment
about: Propose a normative change to the toke specification
labels: spec-amendment
---

## Summary

One paragraph describing the proposed normative change.

## Problem

What is currently underspecified, ambiguous, or incorrect?

## Proposed change

The exact change to grammar, type rules, error codes, or stdlib signatures.

## Impact on implementations

What must tkc, toke-stdlib, and toke-benchmark change if this is accepted?

## Alternatives considered

What else was considered and why was it rejected?

## 30-day comment period

This issue will remain open for 30 days before a PR is raised.
